title: SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR - 211info
text: CITY OF SPRINGFIELD WARMING CENTER INFORMATION SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community centers and libraries are available across the city to anyone needing a warm and dry place to go during winter weather. 225 5th Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Email (541) 726-3700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 726-3700 City Manager's Office City Manager's Office (541) 726-3700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
